note: Real SGLang-Diffusion output (H200). To add an item: drop the file in docs/gallery/ and append an entry. image -> src; video -> src (.mp4) + poster (still); 3D -> type model3d + src (.glb).

items.prompt: Andy Warhol's banana (The Velvet Underground & Nico) as a textured 3D mesh — image-to-3D.
A northern industrial town at dusk — smokestacks against a bruised sky, a lone figure on a concrete overpass.
A drummer standing at a minimal kit with a tambourine, stark black-and-white — a primitive, hypnotic rhythm.
A single ripe banana on crumpled silver foil under hard light — Factory-era pop-art cool.
A Scottish highland moor under a brooding sky — a single shaft of light sweeping across the dark hills.
A misty birch forest at dawn — slender white trunks fading into pale fog, a lone walker among them.
Immense sea cliffs battered by huge waves under a storm sky — a shaft of pale light breaking onto the dark ocean.
A vast high plateau under a brooding sky — a single shaft of sunlight sweeping the wild land toward distant peaks.
An immense sea of desert dunes before an approaching sandstorm — low light raking the ridges.
A rover crossing the dust-red Martian surface, mountains on the horizon — a real-time world-model scene.
A paper boat drifting down a rain-slick gutter through fallen ginkgo leaves, shallow depth of field.
